title: MiniJinja template expansion of project-supplied commands
summary: Hook commands, alias steps, and `-x/--execute` bodies are MiniJinja templates rendered at runtime with a context of worktree/repo variables. The templates come from project config (a repo the user may have just cloned) and from CLI args. Risks: a rendering or escaping bug that mis-expands a variable into a command, undeclared-variable handling that silently produces an empty or wrong command, and the ShellArgs object's quoting. Expansion happens before the approval gate sees the final string, so a mismatch between what is approved and what is rendered would bypass approval. Detection must use minijinja::undeclared_variables, never substring or regex on `{{ }}`.

ownedFiles.reason: expand_command_template: runtime render of hook command templates
variable catalog, ShellArgs minijinja object, shell-arg quoting

contextFiles.reason: project config that supplies the templates
approval gate: must see the same string the renderer produces
